corporate_security.scope: Enterprise IT, SOC, detection engineering, incident response
folders: detection/ - SIEM detection rules mapped to attack chain steps
endpoint/ - EDR IOC imports + visibility assessment
emulation/ - ATT&CK Navigator, Atomic tests, hunt hypotheses, gap matrix
iocs/ - STIX bundle, IOC exports, domain lists
soc/ - IR playbooks per attack technique with SIEM-specific triage
executive/ - Threat brief + board brief + risk quantification

content_security.scope: Film/piracy protection, IP theft, pre-release content
folders: detection/ - SIEM detection rules mapped to attack chain steps
endpoint/ - EDR IOC imports + visibility assessment
emulation/ - ATT&CK Navigator, Atomic tests, hunt hypotheses, gap matrix
iocs/ - STIX bundle, IOC exports, domain lists
soc/ - IR playbooks per attack technique with SIEM-specific triage
executive/ - Threat brief + board brief + risk quantification
compliance/ - NIST CSF mapping + audit evidence bundle
email/ - Email security policies and domain blocklists

streaming_security.scope: Paramount+, Pluto TV, subscriber data, cloud infrastructure
folders: cloud/ - Cloud hunt queries, OAuth audit, conditional access gaps
identity/ - Identity hardening, hunt queries, policy recommendations
executive/ - Threat brief + board brief + risk quantification
